_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-750001: Executive Impersonation / BEC Phishing (T1566.001)
scenario: Attacker sends phishing email with display name 'CEO John Smith' from external Gmail account to finance team — BEC precursor
why_tp: Display name 'John Smith CEO' impersonates the CEO — classic BEC pattern
Sender domain is gmail.com, not contoso.com — external impersonation
Subject contains 'Wire Transfer' + 'URGENT' — financial fraud indicators
Sent to finance.team — targeted selection of likely wire transfer approvers
analyst_action: Alert finance.team@contoso.com immediately — do NOT process any wire transfer
Check if any finance team members replied to or clicked links in this email
Block sender domain/IP in email security gateway
Notify CEO (real one) of impersonation attempt
Submit email headers to security team for full IOC extraction
